w1-l05.title: Loop It!
w1-l05.hint1: Doing the same move again and again? There's a block for that.
w1-l05.hint2: Try a 'repeat' block with 'move forward' inside it.

w1-l06.title: Turn and Go
w1-l06.hint1: Combine turning and moving inside your repeat block.
w1-l06.hint2: Think about how many times you need to repeat the pattern.

w1-l07.title: Name Your Number
w1-l07.hint1: A variable can hold how far to go.
w1-l07.hint2: Set a variable, then use it inside your repeat block.

w1-l08.title: Is It Clear?
w1-l08.hint1: Use 'path ahead clear?' inside an if-block to check before you move.
w1-l08.hint2: If the path isn't clear, try turning instead.

w1-l09.title: Loops and Choices
w1-l09.hint1: Combine a repeat block with an if-block.
w1-l09.hint2: Check if the path is clear before moving forward each time.

w1-l10.title: Long Way Home
w1-l10.hint1: A bigger variable means a longer trip — no extra blocks needed.
w1-l10.hint2: Set your variable once, then reuse it.

w1-l11.title: Obstacle Course
w1-l11.hint1: Break the course into short repeat-and-check segments.
w1-l11.hint2: Turn only when the path ahead isn't clear.

w1-l12.title: The Final Trek
w1-l12.hint1: Use everything you've learned: loops, if-checks, and variables.
w1-l12.hint2: Plan your route in sections before you start placing blocks.

w2-l04.title: Scan the Row
w2-l04.hint1: The helper AI needs to check every cell in a straight line.
w2-l04.hint2: A 'repeat' block with 'move forward' inside scans the whole row.

w2-l05.title: Sweep the Lab
w2-l05.hint1: Combine turning and moving inside your repeat block to sweep the room.
w2-l05.hint2: Think about how many times the pattern needs to repeat.

w2-l06.title: Set the Scan Count
w2-l06.hint1: A variable can hold how many data points to scan.
w2-l06.hint2: Set the variable once, then use it inside your repeat block.

w2-l07.title: Sensor Check
w2-l07.hint1: Use 'path ahead clear?' inside an if-block before moving.
w2-l07.hint2: If a reading is blocked, turn and go around it.

w2-l08.title: Sort the Pile
w2-l08.hint1: Combine a repeat block with an if-block to handle each item.
w2-l08.hint2: Check the sensor before every move forward.

w2-l09.title: The Big Dataset
w2-l09.hint1: Use everything you've learned: loops, sensor checks, and variables.
w2-l09.hint2: Plan your scan path in sections before placing blocks.

w2-l10.title: The Long Scan
w2-l10.hint1: A bigger variable means a longer scan — no extra blocks needed.
w2-l10.hint2: Set your variable once, then reuse it.

w2-l11.title: Signal Interference
w2-l11.hint1: Break the course into short repeat-and-check segments.
w2-l11.hint2: Turn only when the sensor path ahead isn't clear.

w2-l12.title: The Final Dataset
w2-l12.hint1: Use everything you've learned: loops, sensor checks, and variables.
w2-l12.hint2: Plan your scan path in sections before you start placing blocks.

w3-l05.title: Copy the Files
w3-l05.hint1: Copying the same file over and over? There's a block for that.
w3-l05.hint2: Try a 'repeat' block with 'move forward' inside it.

w3-l06.title: Update the Software
w3-l06.hint1: Combine turning and moving inside your repeat block.
w3-l06.hint2: Think about how many times you need to repeat the install pattern.

w3-l07.title: Set the Memory Size
w3-l07.hint1: A variable can hold how much memory to use.
w3-l07.hint2: Set a variable, then use it inside your repeat block.

w3-l08.title: Squash the Bug
w3-l08.hint1: Use 'path ahead clear?' inside an if-block before you move.
w3-l08.hint2: If a bug is blocking the path, try routing around it instead.

w3-l09.title: Scan for Viruses
w3-l09.hint1: Combine a repeat block with an if-block to check every file.
w3-l09.hint2: Check if the path is clear before scanning each new file.

w3-l10.title: Long Download
w3-l10.hint1: A bigger variable means a longer download — no extra blocks needed.
w3-l10.hint2: Set your variable once, then reuse it.

w3-l11.title: Dodge the Bugs
w3-l11.hint1: Break the repair job into short repeat-and-check segments.
w3-l11.hint2: Turn only when a bug is blocking the path ahead.

w3-l12.title: Reboot the System
w3-l12.hint1: Use everything you've learned: loops, if-checks, and variables.
w3-l12.hint2: Plan your repair route in sections before you start placing blocks.

w4-l05.title: Loop the Level
w4-l05.hint1: Doing the same jump again and again? There's a block for that.
w4-l05.hint2: Try a 'repeat' block with 'move forward' inside it.

w4-l06.title: The Patrol Loop
w4-l06.hint1: Combine turning and moving inside your repeat block.
w4-l06.hint2: Think about how many times the patrol pattern repeats.

w4-l07.title: Set the High Score Goal
w4-l07.hint1: A variable can hold how many points you need.
w4-l07.hint2: Set a variable, then use it inside your repeat block.

w4-l08.title: Avoid the Enemy
w4-l08.hint1: Use 'path ahead clear?' inside an if-block before you move.
w4-l08.hint2: If an enemy blocks the path, dodge around it instead.

w4-l09.title: Enemy Alley
w4-l09.hint1: Combine a repeat block with an if-block to get past every enemy.
w4-l09.hint2: Check if the path is clear before moving forward each time.

w4-l10.title: Speedrun Setup
w4-l10.hint1: A bigger variable means a longer level — no extra blocks needed.
w4-l10.hint2: Set your variable once, then reuse it.

w4-l11.title: Boss Room
w4-l11.hint1: Break the boss fight into short repeat-and-check segments.
w4-l11.hint2: Turn only when the boss blocks the path ahead.

w4-l12.title: Build the Final Level
w4-l12.hint1: Use everything you've learned: loops, if-checks, and variables.
w4-l12.hint2: Plan your level layout in sections before you start placing blocks.
